summary: Tested new image upload feature end-to-end. All 8 backend tests passed. Full UI flow verified: upload area in step 1, image preview with clear/change buttons, review step thumbnail, errand submission with image, dashboard card with image, errand detail image display.

issues: Image thumbnail in review step renders but appears very small/faint for tiny test images. Feature works correctly with real photos.

critical_code_review_comments: All image upload feature code is clean and correct.
Content-type validation checks file.content_type which works for multipart uploads.
Size validation reads full file content before checking size - for very large files this could be memory-intensive, but the 8MB limit is reasonable.
GET /api/images/{filename} doesn't require auth - intentional for public image serving (correct).
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Image Errand and TEST_No Image Errand via backend tests. Created 'UI Test Image Item' errand via frontend UI test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image upload feature fully tested and working: 1) POST /api/upload accepts image files up to 8MB, rejects non-images (400), rejects oversized files (400), returns {url, filename}. 2) GET /api/images/{filename} serves uploaded images with 200 status (no auth required). 3) Errands store image_url and return it in list/detail responses. 4) PostErrand step 1 shows upload area (dashed border, image icon), file chooser opens on click, preview shown after upload with X/clear and Change buttons. 5) Review step (4) shows image thumbnail. 6) Dashboard cards show h-36 image at top when image_url present, package icon when no image. 7) ErrandDetail shows full-width image below item details. Known issue from iter 2: WebSocket connections fail with 403 in preview env (unrelated to image feature).
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All image upload feature requirements are implemented and working correctly.
